sources.name: BSI IT-Grundschutz Kompendium
sources.completeness_note: Key Bausteine from process and system layers. Full compendium has ~1500 requirements.

sources.name: BSI C5 Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria Catalogue
sources.completeness_note: Key controls from all 17 domains. Full catalogue has ~121 controls.

sources.name: BSI Technische Richtlinien
sources.completeness_note: Key requirements from TR-02102, TR-03116, TR-03107, TR-03138, TR-03148

sources.name: KRITIS Requirements (IT-Sicherheitsgesetz 2.0)
sources.completeness_note: Core KRITIS requirements including reporting obligations and attack detection

sources.name: BfDI Technisch-Organisatorische Massnahmen (DSGVO Art. 32)
sources.completeness_note: All eight TOM categories plus pseudonymization, resilience, and review requirements

tools.name: search_controls
tools.description: Full-text search across all controls in German and English

tools.name: get_control
tools.description: Retrieve a specific control by framework-prefixed ID

tools.name: list_controls
tools.description: List all controls for a given framework with optional category filter

tools.name: list_frameworks
tools.description: List all available frameworks with control counts

tools.name: get_framework
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific framework

tools.name: get_iso_mapping
tools.description: Find German controls mapped to a specific ISO 27001/27002 control

tools.name: compare_controls
tools.description: Compare controls between frameworks side by side

tools.name: search_by_sector
tools.description: Find controls relevant to a specific sector

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, stats, data sources, and disclaimer

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Per-source data age report with staleness flags

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: Data provenance and licensing information for all sources
